victim.value: Maria Tate, a babysitter who encountered 'the man with the bloody hand' and was stabbed
victim.quote: He drove the knife into me and yanked it out again. I looked down to see my blood gush out.

culprit_and_motive.value: The man with the bloody hand, supernatural entity with unclear motive for targeting victims
culprit_and_motive.quote: All who read this beware for you will be my next victim.

red_herring.value: Initial suggestion that prank callers are responsible, when supernatural threat is real
red_herring.quote: At this point I came to the conclusion that it was a prank caller.

clue_fairness.value: All supernatural manifestations (bloody hand, blood from tap, phone calls) witnessed by reader through Maria's POV
clue_fairness.quote: The letter box opened and a bloody hand covered in bandages appeared.

social_world.value: Working class young women (babysitters, students) as vulnerable targets in domestic spaces
social_world.quote: I told him of course I could and that my rates were £3.50 an hour.

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural entity continues pattern by targeting reader of the account
reveal_mechanic.quote: Hello Isis I believe you read my story. I am the man with the bloody hand and I'm at the door.

media_and_audience.value: Written warning disguised as fiction, with police dismissal of supernatural evidence
media_and_audience.quote: The police thoroughly checked the house but couldn't find a drop of blood

investigator_wound.value: Isis's isolation as newcomer to town makes her vulnerable to same pattern
investigator_wound.quote: She had just moved to the town and didn't know why she had gotten the apartment so dirt cheap.

_meta.title: ebook angel of death the forgotten book
